title: Harbor's Hungry Peaceful
body:
# About

A "hunger in Peaceful" mod. Disables passive health and saturation regen and enables Easy-difficulty hunger decay on Peaceful. Does not update the corresponding settings menu tooltip, because I am lazy. Does not require the Fabric API. 

I mostly made this because none of the existing mods had been updated to 1.21 and I wanted to play it myself


# Credits 

There are a few other mods like this one. This mod in particular was inspired by the mod [Hunger on Peaceful](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hunger-on-peaceful) and [techguy16's fork](https://modrinth.com/mod/hunger-in-peaceful) for 1.20. The latter has now also been ported to 1.21.4 if you'd prefer to use his instead.
